effortModel.citation: ReadingLength + r/productivity: casual self-help 1.0-1.2 + bedtime slowdown + reflection margin = 2.5

expectedStrategy: 8 pages/day at 20 min → 35-day completion at P50
offer 3 pace options: slow (5-8p/day ~6-8wks), normal (8-12p/day ~4-5wks), fast (20+p/day ~2wks)
chapter endings as natural stopping points
hardFailChecks: must NOT ask unnecessary questions (0 questions required)
must NOT give more than 1 coaching tip
must NOT recommend note-taking methods or habit-stacking coaching unprompted
no over-coaching: casual reading mode must be respected
toneExpectation: warm and light; bedtime reading vibe; encouraging without being prescriptive
